$comment: Phase 6 (TODO-07) Sprint Planning verdict. Consensus BINARY gate (SPRINT READY). 100% FR->story coverage, Sprint-1 SP <= capacity*0.95, DoD AHP CR < 0.10, open_items = 0. No GitHub/network calls were made - the issues manifest is LOCAL and ready-to-create only. Source: backlog.md, sprint_1_backlog.md, fr_story_traceability.json, github_issues_manifest.json, sprint_agent_briefs.json.
pert_method: E = (O + 4M + P) / 6; SP = nearest Fibonacci to E; SD = (P - O) / 6.
capacity_method: 5 engineers x ~8.4 SP/engineer (greenfield Sprint-1 velocity estimate) = 42 SP gross; commitment ceiling = 42 x 0.95 = 39.9 SP.
sprint_goal: Stand up a deployable, authenticated, tenant-isolated ingestion-and-routing thin slice (upload -> TOC -> chunk -> embed -> store -> route) on CI-gated, health-checked services with DPDP x-pii data-access in place from day one.

dpdp_fr029_xpii.rationale: Sprint 1 ingests and stores document PII, so the DPDP x-pii access path (FR-029) + data-access export (FR-026) is auto-created into Sprint 1.

cert_in_6h_hook.rationale: Full CERT-In 6-hour incident-reporting hook (5 SP) scheduled Sprint 2 to respect the 95% capacity ceiling; its security-scanning and audit-logging substrate lands in Sprint 1 so no PII is processed without a security gate and audit trail. NEEDS USER DECISION (see open_decisions).

github_action: MANIFEST ONLY - github_issues_manifest.json is local and ready-to-create. No gh CLI, no GitHub MCP, no API call was invoked. Creation is deferred to explicit user approval.

open_decisions.question: Pull the full CERT-In hook into Sprint 1 (raises commitment over the 39.9 SP ceiling, would require dropping a foundation story), or keep it Sprint 2 with only its audit/security substrate in Sprint 1?
open_decisions.recommended_default: Sprint 2 (substrate-only in Sprint 1). Sprint 1 already lands the secrets/SAST gate (STORY-005) and audit-logging substrate (STORY-038); no PII flows without a security gate. Pulling the full 5-SP hook into Sprint 1 would breach the 95% capacity ceiling or evict the P0 router/chunking work.

open_decisions.question: Confirm the ~8.4 SP/engineer first-sprint velocity, or set a more conservative figure?
open_decisions.recommended_default: Accept 42 SP for Sprint 1; recalibrate from Sprint 1 actuals before Sprint 2. The 95% ceiling already absorbs greenfield uncertainty.

open_decisions.question: Create the 11 Sprint-1 issues + labels + 'Sprint 1' milestone from github_issues_manifest.json on the techdeveloper-org repo now?
open_decisions.recommended_default: Do NOT create yet. The GitHub MCP is not connected and issue creation is an outward-facing action; hold at the STOP point for explicit user approval. Manifest is ready to apply on approval.

stop_point: User reviews sprint board (manifest). Status set to awaiting_user in ledger.json per checkpoint protocol.
